title: Midnight Phase 0 live-state reconciliation complete
body: Phase 0 Task 0.1 live-state reconciliation complete. Sonar issues: 40 by the same 18 rules; Sonar hotspots: 12 with 11 S5332 and 1 S4036; quality gate conditions match the plan failure shape. CodeQL broad PR-ref API returned 8 open alerts, but gh pr checks still reports one new-alert aggregate failure and #90 is the only alert created on 2026-05-21 at the planned site; I recorded that API scope caveat inline. Plan body edited only in pr-108-snagging.plan.md; next action is focused markdown validation, then commit protocol.
